title: Set up a Team space for your group
staff_situations: How do I set up a Team space for my group?
underlying_needs: A shared, organised space where a group can find posts, files and conversations in one place
A consistent structure learners can navigate without re-learning it every time they log in
Access set correctly from the start, so the right people can see and use the space and no one else

accessibility: Consistent channel names and structure reduce the navigation effort for learners using a screen reader or switch access
A predictable layout means a learner doesn't have to relearn the space each time they return to it
inclusive_practice: A well-organised shared space benefits every learner in the group, not only those who ask where something is
Clear structure reduces how often a learner needs to ask staff to repeat navigation instructions

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: Team and group setup
